TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 4
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.365.cipherString: A trustee has a responsibility to guard the assets of others with a higher degree of care than he does his own.
CIPHER.365.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote by John Ashcroft, encrypted as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.365.author: John Ashcroft

CIPHER.347.cipherString: There is so little time. We need to make every moment count.
CIPHER.347.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Shannon Delany encoded with a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.347.author: Shannon Delany

CIPHER.351.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's a quote, written using a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 53708 724061 940428 decode to?

CIPHER.348.cipherString: Night had come on like the closing of a great but gentle eye.
CIPHER.348.question: The following odd symbols were found when a tomb was opened, but you recognized it as the handiwork of a prankster who scratched a quote by Ray Bradbury on the wall using a Baconian alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.348.author: Ray Bradbury

CIPHER.362.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Affine-encrypted message with a=15 and b=19. What does it say?
CIPHER.362.author: Unknown

CIPHER.343.cipherString: Writing a book of poetry is like dropping a rose petal down the Grand Canyon and waiting for the echo.
CIPHER.343.question: You came across the following written on a wall in a cave. You are told that it's a quote by Don Marquis encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with WRIT. What does it say?
CIPHER.343.author: Don Marquis

CIPHER.350.cipherString: To understand someone, find out how he spends his money.
CIPHER.350.question: While repairing an old telescope, you find a note hidden in the tube. The message is a quote by Mason Cooley written in a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has HOWHES in it corresponding to the encoded text Q N J R P L Y X N, meaning J = –––; L = ●●●; N = ●●×; P = –××; Q = ×●●; R = ×●–; X = ××●; Y = ●×●. What does it say?
CIPHER.350.author: Mason Cooley

CIPHER.345.cipherString: Sé que muchos artistas sienten que son unos impostores; eso forma parte del placer de la creatividad.
CIPHER.345.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by David Cronenberg in Spanish, encoded using a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains UNOS. What does it say?
CIPHER.345.author: David Cronenberg
CIPHER.345.translation: I know that many artists feel that they are frauds - that's part of the pleasure of creativity.

CIPHER.357.cipherString: Education enables people and societies to be what they can be.
CIPHER.357.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Bill Richardson encoded in a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of GLORY and polybius key of GOLDFISH. What does it say?
CIPHER.357.author: Bill Richardson

CIPHER.353.cipherString: When I eventually met Mr. Right I had no idea that his first name was Always.
CIPHER.353.question: Your lab partner's retainer case clicked open to reveal this Porta-encrypted quote by Rita Rudner using a keyword of WARM. What does it say?
CIPHER.353.author: Rita Rudner

CIPHER.344.cipherString: There is nothing more beautiful than cheerfulness in an old face, and among country people it is always a sign of a well-regulated life.
CIPHER.344.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Richter encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with LIFE. What does it say?
CIPHER.344.author: Richter

CIPHER.354.cipherString: We are the masters at the moment and shall be for some considerable time.
CIPHER.354.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Hartley Shawcross encoded with a Porta using a keyword of VEINS. What does it say?
CIPHER.354.author: Hartley Shawcross

CIPHER.349.cipherString: Only the most uncritical minds are free from doubt.
CIPHER.349.question: While analyzing the background noise from a physics experiment, you detect this pattern. It's a quote by Aldo Leopold, encoded using a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has SAREF in it corresponding to the encoded text E Y K D A X N, meaning A = ●××; D = –●×; E = ●●●; K = –×●; N = ●×●; X = ●●–; Y = ××●. What does it say?
CIPHER.349.author: Aldo Leopold

CIPHER.359.cipherString: He that despairs measures Providence by his own little contracted model.
CIPHER.359.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote, written as an Atbash. What does it say?

CIPHER.363.cipherString: If your experiment needs a statistician, you need a better experiment.
CIPHER.363.question: While scrolling through an old floppy disk labeled "TOP SECRET", you discovered this quote by Ernest Rutherford hidden as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of SPARKLING. What does it say?
CIPHER.363.author: Ernest Rutherford

CIPHER.358.cipherString: You choose what you learn, just as you choose what you fail at.
CIPHER.358.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a physics exam from years ago. It's a quote by Anthony T. Hincks, encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of SIMPLY and polybius key of DUPLICATE. What does it say?
CIPHER.358.author: Anthony T. Hincks

CIPHER.360.cipherString: Courts do not exist for the sake of discipline, but for the sake of deciding matters in controversy.
CIPHER.360.question: The marching band's sheet music rearranged itself into this Caesar pattern—it's a quote by Charles Bowen, Baron Bowen encoded. What does it say?
CIPHER.360.author: Charles Bowen, Baron Bowen

CIPHER.361.cipherString: No tree falls at the first blow.
CIPHER.361.question: The cafeteria receipt printed a German Proverb using the Affine cipher with a=7 and b=6. What does it say?
CIPHER.361.author: German Proverb

CIPHER.342.cipherString: Pain reaches the heart with electrical speed, but truth moves to the heart as slowly as a glacier.
CIPHER.342.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Barbara Kingsolver, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.342.author: Barbara Kingsolver

CIPHER.352.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Cryptarithm puzzle. What do the values 151 096071635 287864 decode to?

CIPHER.356.cipherString: Have an attitude of gratitude. Be thankful for your health now. Don't wait till Thanksgiving.
CIPHER.356.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Joshua Tongol encrypted as a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has WAITTIL somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.356.author: Joshua Tongol

CIPHER.364.cipherString: True happiness is not found in people, places, or things. It is found in our own hearts.
CIPHER.364.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Checkerboard-encrypted quote by Avijeet Das with a polybius key of NIGHTMARE. What does it say?
CIPHER.364.author: Avijeet Das

CIPHER.341.cipherString: Nothing in this world compares to the comfort and security of having someone just hold your hand.
CIPHER.341.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Richelle E. Goodrich, encrypted with an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.341.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

CIPHER.346.cipherString: It's amazing how stress keeps you trim.
CIPHER.346.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Peter Andre, written in a Baconian. You are told that the cipher text DRUMS EVERY MONTH FUZZY decodes to be SAMA. What does it say?
CIPHER.346.author: Peter Andre

CIPHER.355.cipherString: Hopes, wants and wishes, all cast across the night sky with my heart in tow.
CIPHER.355.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a physics exam from years ago. It's a quote by Jay Long, encrypted as a Complete Columnar. The quote has ASTA somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.355.author: Jay Long
